---
title: Support for {{REPOSITORY_NAME}}
description: Best-effort support channels and boundaries for learners and contributors using {{REPOSITORY_NAME}}.
---

## Support Model

Support is community-based and best effort. This repository does not provide
production support, consulting, guaranteed responses, or a service-level agreement.

## Choose The Right Channel

| Need | Channel |
| --- | --- |
| Setup, exercise, or usage question | {{DISCUSSIONS_URL}} |
| Idea or broad improvement | {{DISCUSSIONS_URL}} |
| Reproducible repository defect | {{ISSUES_URL}} |
| Documentation or lab error | {{ISSUES_URL}} |
| Suspected vulnerability | Private process in {{SECURITY_PATH}} |
| Conduct concern | Private process in {{CONDUCT_PATH}} |

Search existing content before starting a new thread. Include the exercise,
command, expected result, actual result, environment, and non-sensitive evidence
needed to understand the problem.

## Protect Sensitive Information

Do not post passwords, tokens, connection strings, private repository content,
personal data, confidential information, or vulnerability details publicly.
Redact logs and screenshots before sharing them.

## Third-Party Services

Questions about GitHub, GitHub Copilot, Azure, Docker, extensions, packages, or
other third-party services may need to be handled through that provider's
documentation and support channels. Their terms, policies, availability, and
charges apply independently.
